name: Leader of the Swiftstriders [ARCANE ODYSSEY]
description:
"A Grand Navy investigation uncovered that the Swiftstriders recently started working with the Assassin Syndicate to..."

After scaling an extremely tall Swiftstriders tower in the Nimbus Sea to fight the boss, you meet with the leader of the organization at the top.

Hello there! It's your boy, Phone, back with another Arcane Odyssey bot for all of you. The first message is actually how I scaled the Main Swiftstriders tower in game, and you can see a couple pixels of my player character behind the screenshot of Lysara in the thumbnail.
creator: thephoner
